debug_info.goal: ⊢ {f | (∀ (x : ↑(Set.Ioi 0)), 0 < f x) ∧ ∀ (x : ↑(Set.Ioi 0)), ∃! y, ↑x * f y + ↑y * f x ≤ 2} = IMO2022P2.answer

failed_attempts:
ext f
  simp only [answer, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  constructor
  · rintro ⟨hf_pos, hf_uniq⟩
    let π (x : ℝ+) := (hf_uniq x).exists.choose
    have hπ : ∀ x, x.1 * f (π x) + (π x).1 * f x ≤ 2 := fun x ↦ (hf_uniq x).exists.choose_spec.1
    have hπ_uniq : ∀ x y, x.1 * f y + y.1 * f x ≤ 2 → y = π x := fun x y ↦ (hf_uniq x).exists.choose_spec.2 y
    have key : ∀ x, x.1 * f x ≤ 1 := by
      intro x
      by_contra h
      have hgt : x.1 * f x > 1 := lt_of_not_le h
      let y := π x
      have hy_ne : y ≠ x := fun heq ↦ by rw [heq] at hgt; have := hπ x; linarith
      have h_pair_symm : y.1 * f x + x.1 * f y ≤ 2 := by rw [add_comm]; exact hπ x
      have : π y = x := hπ_uniq y x h_pair_symm
      have hy_gt : y.1 * f y > 1 := by
        by_contra hle; push_neg at hle
        have : π y = y := hπ_uniq y y (by linarith)
        exact hy_ne (this ▸ ‹π y = x›).symm
      have amgm := Real.two_mul_sqrt_le_add (x.1 * f y) (y.1 * f x) (by positivity) (by positivity)
      nlinarith
    have map_id : ∀ x, π x = x := fun x ↦ hπ_uniq x x (by linarith [key x])
    intro x
    by_contra h_ne
    have h_lt : x.1 * f x < 1 := lt_of_le_of_ne (key x) h_ne
    let k := x.1 * f x
    let t := 1 / k
    have ht : t > 1 := one_lt_div_of_lt (mul_pos x.2 (hf_pos x)) h_lt
    let y : ℝ+ := ⟨t * x.1, mul_pos (by linarith) x.2⟩
    have hy_ne : y ≠ x := fun h ↦ by injection h with h; dsimp at h; nlinarith
    have : x.1 * f y + y.1 * f x > 2 := by
      by_contra hle
      have : y = x := map_id x ▸ hπ_uniq x y hle
      exact hy_ne this
    have : y.1 * f y > 1 := by
      calc y.1 * f y = t * (x.1 * f y) := by dsimp [y]; ring
         _ > t * (2 - y.1 * f x) := by have : x.1 * f y > 2 - y.1 * f x := by linarith; gcongr
         _ = t * (2 - t * k) := by dsimp [y]; field_simp [k]; ring
         _ = 1 / k := by field_simp [t, k, (hf_pos x)]
         _ > 1 := ht
    linarith [key y]
  · intro hf
    constructor
    · intro x; rw [hf]; positivity
    · intro x; use x; rw [hf, hf]
      simp only [mul_div_cancel_left _ (ne_of_gt x.2)]
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · intro y hy
        rw [hf, hf] at hy
        field_simp [x.2, y.2] at hy
        have : (x.1 - y.1)^2 ≤ 0 := by nlinarith
        ext; linarith
